Package com.marswars.proxy_server

Class ProxyServerThread

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Thread
com.marswars.proxy_server.ProxyServerThread
All Implemented Interfaces:
Runnable
public class ProxyServerThread extends Thread
Proxy server thread for handling UDP communication with external systems. Receives and processes various packet types including odometry, module states, AprilTag solutions, piece detections, and timesync requests. Provides bidirectional communication capabilities on a single UDP port.

PhotonVision Simulation Support

In simulation mode, this class can use PhotonVision simulation to generate simulated vision data that populates the tagSolutions queue, allowing you to test vision-based robot code without a physical robot or vision coprocessor.

Usage Example:


 // In your robot initialization (Robot.java or subsystem)
 ProxyServerThread proxyServer = ProxyServerThread.getInstance();
 
 // Initialize vision simulation (only in simulation mode)
 if (RobotBase.isSimulation()) {
     // Load the field layout
     AprilTagFieldLayout fieldLayout = AprilTagFieldLayout.loadField(
         AprilTagFields.k2025Reefscape
     );
     MwVisionSimulation visionSim = proxyServer.initializeVisionSimulation(fieldLayout);
     
     // Add default cameras (front, left, right, back)
     visionSim.addDefaultCameras();
     
     // Or add a custom camera
     // Camera mounted 0.5m forward, 0.3m up, angled 15 degrees down
     Transform3d robotToCamera = new Transform3d(
         new Translation3d(0.5, 0, 0.3),
         new Rotation3d(0, Math.toRadians(-15), 0)
     );
     visionSim.addCamera("simCamera", robotToCamera);
 }
 
 // In your periodic method, update with current robot pose
 if (RobotBase.isSimulation()) {
     Pose2d currentPose = drivetrain.getPose(); // Get from your drivetrain
     proxyServer.updateVisionSimulation(currentPose);
 }
 
 // Vision data will now be available via getLatestTagSolutions()
 List<TagSolutionData> solutions = proxyServer.getLatestTagSolutions();
See Also:

    • ProxyServerThread

      public ProxyServerThread()

  • Method Details

    • getInstance

      public static ProxyServerThread getInstance()
      Gets the singleton instance of the ProxyServerThread.
      Returns:
      the ProxyServerThread instance

    • start

      public void start()
      Overrides:
      start in class Thread

    • run

      public void run()
      Specified by:
      run in interface Runnable
      Overrides:
      run in class Thread

    • configureServer

      public boolean configureServer()
      Binds the server socket to the set port to begin communication. This must be called once before you can attempt to updateData().
      Returns:
      true: server configured successfully | false: configuration error occurred.
      Throws:
      SocketException - if the socket could not be opened, or the socket could not bind to the specified local port.

    • sendData

      public boolean sendData(byte[] buffer)
      Sends data back to the last connected client on the same port
      Parameters:
      buffer - the byte array to send
      Returns:
      true if data was sent successfully, false if there was an error

    • getLatestOdometryReadings

      public List<OdomPacket.OdometryData> getLatestOdometryReadings()
      Gets the current robot pose, velocity, and variance data from odometry readings. Data is updated by calling updateData() periodically.
      Returns:
      list of recent OdomPacket.OdometryData from chassis proxy

    • getLatestModuleStatesReadings

      public List<StatesPacket.ModuleStatesData> getLatestModuleStatesReadings()
      Gets the current robot module states information. States are updated by calling updateData() periodically.
      Returns:
      list of recent StatesPacket.ModuleStatesData containing swerve module information

    • getLatestModuleStatesArrays

      public List<SwerveModuleState[]> getLatestModuleStatesArrays()
      Gets the current robot module states as individual SwerveModuleState arrays. This is a convenience method that extracts the module states arrays from the data objects.
      Returns:
      list of SwerveModuleState arrays (for backward compatibility)

    • getLatestTagSolutions

      public List<TagSolutionPacket.TagSolutionData> getLatestTagSolutions()
      Gets the current AprilTag solution information. Solutions are updated by calling updateData() periodically.
      Returns:
      list of recent TagSolutionPacket.TagSolutionData with pose estimates and detected tag IDs

    • getLatestPieceDetections

      public List<PieceDetectionPacket.PieceDetectionData> getLatestPieceDetections()
      Gets the current detected game pieces information. Detections are updated by calling updateData() periodically.
      Returns:
      list of recent PieceDetectionPacket.PieceDetectionData with piece detection information

    • snapshot

      public boolean snapshot(String tag_name)
      Sends snapshot trigger packet for log location flagging
      Parameters:
      tag_name - flag name to record in log
      Returns:
      true if packet was sent successfully, false otherwise

    • syncMatchData

      public boolean syncMatchData()
      Sends match data packet for log name syncing
      Returns:
      true if packet was sent successfully, false otherwise

    • sendCustomPacket

      public boolean sendCustomPacket(byte message_id, byte[] payload)
      Sends a custom packet with specified message ID and payload data
      Parameters:
      message_id - the message type identifier
      payload - the data payload (can be null for header-only packets)
      Returns:
      true if packet was sent successfully, false otherwise

    • getClientAddress

      public SocketAddress getClientAddress()
      Gets the current client address that the server is communicating with
      Returns:
      SocketAddress of the last client that sent data, null if no client has connected

    • hasClientConnection

      public boolean hasClientConnection()
      Checks if the server has an active client connection
      Returns:
      true if there is a client address available for sending data

    • initializeVisionSimulation

      public MwVisionSim initializeVisionSimulation(AprilTagFieldLayout fieldLayout)
      Initializes vision simulation for generating simulated vision data. This should be called in simulation mode to enable PhotonVision simulation. Only works in simulation mode - does nothing on real robot.
      Parameters:
      fieldLayout - the AprilTag field layout to use
      Returns:
      the created MwVisionSimulation instance, or null if not in simulation

    • updateVisionSimulation

      public void updateVisionSimulation(Pose2d robotPose)
      Updates the vision simulation with the current robot pose and generates vision data. This should be called periodically with the simulated robot pose. The generated vision data is automatically added to the tagSolutions queue. Only works in simulation mode - does nothing on real robot.
      Parameters:
      robotPose - the current simulated robot pose
